subTitle: An entourage can be more of a hindrance than a help! Catherine's had trouble wedding dress shopping due to the opinions of her mum and her best man.

title: Celebrity IOU
subTitle: Wanda Sykes thanks her honorary niece, Amber, whose family has been an integral part of Wanda's life. Now, Wanda partners up with Jonathan and Drew for a bedroom and bathroom refresh in a house that has been in Amber's family.

subTitle: The couples reveal details of their most intense moments from the season, with some surprising updates on where things stand now.

title: Food Paradise
subTitle: Since fantastic food is more important to many travellers than museums, hotels and souvenirs, we've compiled all the must-stop food spots across the country that offer a one-of-a-kind dining experience.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Twins Marlo and Margo return, with Marlo as the bride. In a cruel case of karma, Margo's sass comes out and family drama further escalates upon the revelation of a major secret. Bride Val needs a gown for her icy wedding atop an Alaskan glacier.

title: Buddy vs. Duff
subTitle: Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman create enticing cake versions of food feasts. Duff's team makes a realistic farmers market while Buddy and his team create a towering monument of sweet treats. Then 50 esteemed cake artists choose the winner.

title: Restaurant: Impossible
subTitle: At Rest Haven in Clarksdale, MS, owner Paula's unwillingness to change is destroying her father's Lebanese restaurant and her son's chance of inheriting it. Robert Irvine must teach Paula to trust her son and her staff to save the family legacy.

title: Food Paradise
subTitle: From seriously saucy barbecue sandwiches to nachos on a pizza and the perfect burger for "Dirty Dancing," these restaurants serve up some of the best dishes in America's heartland.

subTitle: Robert Irvine meets Ray, an ex-con who turned his life around but can't find success with his restaurant, Dreadlife Kitchen in Hendersonville, NC. With bad decor and no systems, Robert must help Ray transform his business and build his brand.

subTitle: A cake celebrating Superman becomes one cake artist's kryptonite; a cake for a stylish client could be a fashion faux pas; a cake that explodes with candy makes for a sweet surprise.

subTitle: The chefs have 30 minutes to create their dream last meal using only ingredients like frozen or dried meats, dehydrated veggies, and canned food.

subTitle: Michael Voltaggio and Christian Petroni choose chefs Lanny Chin and Wendy Zeng to tackle a tricky star ingredient in hopes of defeating Bobby Flay.

title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way
subTitle: Americans move to a foreign country all in the name of love. Will uprooting their lives in the United States pay off, or will they be packing up and moving back to America brokenhearted?
